testsuite.name: as a user, I want to register a service with its basic information so I can offer it

testcase.name: service registration with description empty - exception

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for By.xpath: //*[@id="root"]/div/aside/nav/button[3]/span to be present (tried for 5 second(s) with 100 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.16.1', revision: '9b4c83354e' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.19' Driver info: driver.version: unknown
